text.title: user-research-at-scale Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for user-research-at-scale as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Auto-summarisers compress 30-minute interviews to one paragraph and lose disconfirming evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Compression loses context; require quote retention with timestamps for every claim.

failure-mode.description: Sentiment models trained on product reviews mis-tag user-research segments (heavy use of past tense, hypothetical framing).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: User-research speech patterns differ fundamentally from product reviews; retrain or use domain-specific sentiment models.

failure-mode.description: LLM "synthetic users" used to validate willingness-to-pay or behaviour.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Synthetic users are sycophantic; never use them to validate go/no-go decisions, only to seed prompts and edge cases.

failure-mode.description: Diarisation errors mis-attribute moderator speech to participants, biasing tag distributions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always verify speaker tags before clustering; diarisation accuracy drops on overlapping speech and accents.

failure-mode.description: Multi-agent pipelines without idempotency reprocess the same recording when re-run, double-counting tags.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require deduplication keys (recording ID + run ID) before any tagging write.

failure-mode.description: Agent pipelines push transcripts to a repository without PII redaction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GDPR/CCPA require PII redaction before storage; pair with password-scrubber-agent or equivalent before pushing transcripts to a repo.

failure-mode.description: "AI follow-up question" features that ask leading questions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Review generated probes before they ship to participants; leading questions bias responses and violate research ethics.
